scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:api && npm run test:ui && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:unit --workspace techweb-backend && npm run test:unit --workspace @techweb-project/frontend
scripts.test:integration: npm run test:integration --workspace techweb-backend && npm run test:integration --workspace @techweb-project/frontend
